The web search results confirm the existence of this paper. Multiple sources document the publication in Springer's Zeitschrift für Physik with complete metadata matching the cited reference.

EXPLANATION: The paper exists and was published in Zeitschrift für Physik volume 72, pages 310–337, in 1931. The author is Erich Hückel and the title matches the cited reference (with "Quanstentheoretische" rather than "Quantentheoretische" in the second title word). The DOI and Springer publication data fully confirm the reference.
